query:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  m.indication,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) as medication_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.trade_name LIMIT 10) as sample_medications
FROM medications m
WHERE m.indication IS NOT NULL 
  AND m.indication != ''
  AND m.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT medication_id FROM medication_icd_mapping WHERE medication_id IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY m.indication
ORDER BY medication_count DESC
